creator: _jkrow
caption:
Um, WOW. My eyes were not prepared for this 😭 

Tulip season in the Netherlands runs from late March to early May🌷my jaw hit the ground when we got here because our world is SO. BEAUTIFUL.

📍 South Holland, The Netherlands 
🗓️ April 8, 2026

Many of these fields are working farms for tulip export. Some do allow visitors, so look for posted signs or ask the farm for permission to take photos.

Would you drive out of the way to see this?
